title: Create: Spaghetti
description:
This projekt adds spaghetti to create
It is finaly in beta
body:
## Finaly!
the beta version is out now
and test out the new features that i added

This project is still very new, and feedback or ideas are always helpful for future updates.

Have fun with the mod! :D

**~with english and german support~**

Link to my reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/Create_Spaghettie/s/oZqD2gDIKT

I don't know abot changelogs if you wanna know the changes of the latest version just ask me on reddit,discord or test the new version.

Please ignore the file names the version is not related to the file name.
